phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find the tourist office
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve l'office de tourisme ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV loh-FEES duh too-REEZM
phrases.cultural_note: The tourist office on La Canebière can help with maps, tickets, and local information.

responses.english: It's a bit further down La Canebière, on the right.
responses.phonetic: say uhn puh plew BAH soor lah kah-nuh-BYEHR, ah DRWAHT
responses.french: C'est un peu plus bas sur La Canebière, à droite.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find good coffee
phrases.text_local: Où peut-on prendre un bon café par ici ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo puh-TON PRAN-dreh uhn bon kah-FAY par ee-SEE
phrases.cultural_note: The side streets off Canebière have better cafés than the main avenue. Try Rue de la République for alternatives.

responses.english: Try the side streets, there are good cafés.
responses.phonetic: say par lah, zhoost oh boo duh lah roo
responses.french: Essayez les rues à côté, il y a de bons cafés.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get to the Vieux-Port from here
phrases.text_local: Comment aller au Vieux-Port depuis ici ?
phrases.pronunciation: kuh-MAN ah-LAY oh VYUH-POR deh-PWEE ee-SEE
phrases.cultural_note: The Vieux-Port is a 10-minute walk downhill from Canebière. Head south on Canebière and you'll see the port ahead.

responses.english: Go straight down, it's a ten-minute walk.
responses.phonetic: say par lah, zhoost oh boo duh lah roo
responses.french: Descendez tout droit, c'est à dix minutes à pied.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tourist office is on La Canebière
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve l'office de tourisme sur la Canebière ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV loh-FEES duh toor-EEZM soor lah kah-nuh-BYAIR
phrases.cultural_note: La Canebière is Marseille's grand boulevard, once compared to the Champs-Élysées; the tourist office is at its eastern end.

responses.english: At number eleven, toward the Old Port.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how far the Old Port is
phrases.text_local: À quelle distance se trouve le Vieux-Port ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel dees-TAHNS suh TROOV luh vyuh-POR

responses.english: Five minutes on foot going down.
responses.phonetic: SANK mee-NOOT ah PYAY ahn day-sahn-DAHN.
responses.french: Cinq minutes à pied en descendant.
